scripts.download:env: doppler secrets download -c dev --project alchemy-v2 --no-file --format env > .env
scripts.deploy: doppler run -c dev --project alchemy-v2 -- alchemy deploy
scripts.dev: doppler run -c dev --project alchemy-v2 -- alchemy dev
scripts.destroy: doppler run -c dev --project alchemy-v2 -- alchemy destroy
scripts.test: doppler run -c dev --project alchemy-v2 -- bun test
